handbook.title: Intro
handbook.text: Weaver of tales. With their magical melodies, Bards are the heart and soul of every adventure. While wizards use hard-won knowledge and Druids use the power of nature, Bard's channel the power of pure charisma to author the world around them. Bards take the roll of support caster, shaking the resolve of enemies and shaping the face of the battlefield. Many bards are the face of their adventuring party, using their wit and tact to expertly navigate social situations.

handbook.title: When Adventuring
handbook.text: A bard's magic can be invaluable when adventuring. Spells like Conjure Illusion and Disguise, and Trick up Your Sleeve can help a party get out of sticky situations, while Song of Healing can keep party members on their feet in combat. Bards leave feats of strength to the martial classes, but it is not out of the ordinary for a highly dextrous bard to sneak into danger alongside the party rogue.

handbook.title: When Socializing
handbook.text: Bards shine in social situations, where their high charisma and arsenal of spells such as Suggestion and Modify Memory help them glean information and escape social traps. Some bards travel town to town and leave a string of heartbroken lovers in their wake, while others climb to the highest echelons of society.

handbook.title: When in Combat
handbook.text: Bards are capable support casters. Spells like Slow and Racous Laughter allow them to weaken their enemies, while Haste empowers their allies. They also make adept healers, casting spells like Song of Healing and Song of Mass Healing. While their damage output may not match wizards or warlocks, spells like Biting Words and Power Chord are still formidable, and the Bard's versitility is second to none.

tier_1.name: Power Chord
tier_1.description: A pulse of sonic energy streaks from you in all directions, sparing allies and harming foes.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check of any creature hit by the spell. On success, they are pushed back fifteen feet and Staggered.

tier_1.name: Biting Words
tier_1.description: As you utter an magical insult, a set of ethereal teeth appear and bite your target.
tier_1.upcast: For every action point spent on this spell, increase its range by 60ft.

effect.description: If you roll max damage, they are hindered until your next turn.

tier_1.name: Breathe Fire
tier_1.description: Magical warmth floods into your stomach before bubbling up and out. You belch a cone of fire, igniting anything before you.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check against your targets. On success, they begin Burning.

tier_1.name: Blocking Hand
tier_1.description: Summon an unseen force of protection to hinder an enemy attack. Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, their attack misses. On failure, it deals half damage.

tier_1.name: Song of Healing
tier_1.description: Your voice fills the air in a soothing melody, and a gentle wave of magic washes over your target. Their wounds begin to heal over and their vitality is restored.

tier_1.name: Distract
tier_1.description: Magically project your voice into an enemy's ears.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they are staggered.

tier_2.name: Kilgore's Thunderous Shout
tier_2.description: You release a mighty shout inspired by the fearsome energy of Kilgore, barbarian minstrel of the realm of cheese and mead.
tier_2.upcast: For each additional action point spent on this spell, increase damage by 1d6 and push enemies 10ft further.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they are thrown back 15ft and knocked prone.

tier_2.name: Song of Mass Healing
tier_2.description: Your voice swells with divine resonance. At the sound, your allies' wounds begin to knit themselves shut.
tier_2.upcast: For each additional action point spent on this spell, increase its radius by 15ft and add an additional dice.

tier_2.name: Counter Magic
tier_2.description: As an enemy attempts to cast a spell, use your power to disrupt them. If the enemy is a minion, their spell instantly fails. Otherwise, make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, their spell is blocked. Counter Magic does not affect natural abilities such as a dragon's fire breath.
tier_2.upcast: You may spend an additional action point on this spell to make your check with advantage, or two more to cause it to work without a check.

tier_2.name: Minor Gate
tier_2.description: With a howl of wind, you tear open a portal large enough to fit yourself and one other individual of your size. It lasts for only a split second, but you may use it to transport yourself and an adjacent ally to a location anywhere within range. If you try to move to a spot you cannot see, you must make an Intelligence Check to determine how close you get to your target.

tier_2.name: Haste
tier_2.description: Your voice rises in a quickening tempo as you urge your target forward.

effect.description: Blood pounds in their ears as they are filled with incredible energy. For the spell's duration, they are affected by the Hastened condition.

tier_3.name: Winged Magic Steed
tier_3.description: Raise your fingers to your mouth and whistle. Instantly, a winged steed appears, made of pure magical energy. The stallion may be de-summoned on command and has 20 health.

tier_3.name: Nothing but Unicorns
tier_3.description: Glitter dances as rainbows stream from you in three lines, tangling into a stampede of unicorns!

effect.description: Roll Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they view you as a jet black unicorn and the earth begins to sparkle and writhe. They are Frightened of you and are Hindered.
effect.save: At the end of each of your turns, you must repeat your check.

tier_1.name: Slow
tier_1.description: Like honey, your words drip over your target.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they are Hindered until the end of their next turn.

tier_1.name: Raucous Laughter
tier_1.description: You fire a quip laced with magic at a foe.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they fall to the ground in laughter and are Incapacitated.
effect.save: Repeat your check at the end of each of your turns or or every minute when out of combat. The effect ends instantly if they are injured.

tier_1.name: Trick up Your Sleeve
tier_1.description: Your sleeve contains a small pocket dimension, capable of holding up to one cubic foot of material. Once you've hidden something up your sleeve, only you may retrieve it. If you fall unconcious or die, anything hidden in your sleeve instantly pops out.
tier_1.upcast: You can spend an action point on this spell to summon up to one hundred feet of tied together cloths from your sleeve. The cloths are bound tightly enough that they may be treated as rope.

tier_1.name: Suggestion
tier_1.description: Your honeyed words are laced with irresistible magic as you speak earnestly to your target. Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they believe the next ten words you speak. They are able to reassess their feelings if they are presented with facts to the contrary. In such a case, You must repeat your check at disadvantage.

tier_1.name: Conjure Illusion
tier_1.description: You are able to conjure a realistic but unmoving illusory image of horse-size or smaller.
tier_1.upcast: If you spend another action point you may create a programmed illusion with both weight and texture and which can be capable of movement and speech. You may establish five scripted responses it is capable of making and tell it where to move.

tier_1.name: Immovable
tier_1.description: With unwavering focus, you channel your energy into an unyielding force that anchors a chosen object in place. The object must be smaller than a wagon, and cannot be a living creature. The spell ends if you move further than the radius from the object or if you lose concentration on it.

tier_2.name: Modify Memory
tier_2.description: Tapping into your magic, you tell a compelling lie.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, modify a memory of your choosing. The target tries to rationalize the modified memory within reason, but will realize what happened if provided with adequate proof.

tier_2.name: Disguise
tier_2.description: With a whispered incantation, you cloak your true form in a shimmering veil of illusion so that you appear to be someone else. You must appear humanoid and be within one foot of your current height. Your disguise can include a new wardrobe. Magical alterations are ethereal and do not hold up to physical inspection.

tier_2.name: Tamberdoodle's Grasp
tier_2.description: Gripping one of your arms at the wrist, you conjure a massive hand made of magical energy in an unoccupied space of your choosing. You are able to command the hand as though it is an extension of your body, though it must remain within the spell's radius. The hand remains until it falls to zero health or you lose concentration on it.

tier_2.name: Hava's Tricksy Escape
tier_2.description: Close your eyes and repeat three times 'Whisked away, vanished' and then 'Poof!' As you finish, you disappear and a perfect, illusory duplicate appears in your place. The illusion is an echo of your soul and moves and acts as you would have for the spell's duration. When the spell ends, your duplicate disappears and you receive its memories.

effect.description: While the spell is active, you are Invisible.

tier_2.name: Invisible Servant
tier_2.description: With a snap of your fingers, you summon an invisible servant to aid you. The servant has no mind of its own, but is instead a manifestation of you will, and follows your orders to the letter. Invisible servants use your Inner Fire as their Dexterity and Strength modifier and have 1 hit point.

tier_3.name: Edmire's Grand Manor
tier_3.description: When you learn this spell, a key appears in your hand. Any time that you wish, you may cast it to cause a matching door to appear. Within, is a lavish mansion, stocked with food and drink and manned by 100 servants. You may design the mansion to have rooms that suit the needs of your party Nothing that originates in the mansion may leave, but what is brought in may stay. Once a door to the mansion is used, it lingers for ten minutes. During that time, anyone that finds it may attempt to break in.

tier_3.name: Summon Bleck
tier_3.description: Summon a mighty bleck to fight for you! A bleck is a gooey creature, one inch in diameter. Bleck have 1hp, and cannot attack. They move only one foot per minute. Bleck cannot be damaged by blades, as they will merely split and then reform. After one minute, a bleck splits into two blecks. Each of these wait for one minute then split into two more. The weight of a million bleck is enough to kill a bleck. Bleck that are killed remain for 1 minute before dissolving into nothingness. After the spell's duration, all bleck are destroyed.

components: A piece of coal blessed by a high priest of Juliet (100gp)

tier_3.name: I Know Malkizar!
tier_3.description: Gather your strength and perform an ancient ritual of obfuscation. Alter the mind of everyone who viewed an event by convincing them that there was another person present named Malkizar. In fourteen words or fewer, describe what Malkizar did. Everyone who witnessed the event now earnestly believes that Malkizar was present and performed the action you described.

handbook.title: Intro
handbook.text: Bulwark against evil. Knights stand tall on the front-line of an adventuring party. All but unkillable, it is their duty to protect their less resilient companions, standing in the way of blows that would slay wizards and rogues where they stand. While many knights work for coin or glory, others are called by a higher purpose. Such paladins can learn divine magic and use it to heal their allies and burn their foes with radiant light. Whether serving as bastion or healer, knights are a shield, holding their party together and standing strong against any foe.

handbook.title: When Adventuring
handbook.text: Knights are strong of body and spirit. Whether bending the bars of a prison cell, charging through a locked door, or putting enemies in their place, a knight's superior strength is of great use to their adventuring party. When things look grim, a party's knight can be counted on to keep going, no matter what. Vile curses, hazardous weather, and incredible fatigue can do little to cause a knight to flag.

handbook.title: When Socializing
handbook.text: Many knights have a special affinity for speaking with other men-at-arms, using the bond of battle to forge fast friendships. Gleaming plate can be intimidating to the peasantry, though it tends to inspire awe rather than fear.

handbook.title: When in Combat
handbook.text: A knight can be counted on to stand at the front line, using their abilities to focus the attention of enemies and stop them from attacking a party's ranged combatants and mages. Your role as a knight will be to defend your party and to punish any enemy that would try to harm them.

level_1.name: Steel Yourself
level_1.description: Brace yourself against an attack. Make a Strength Resistance Check. On success, the attack does no damage. On failure, it deals half damage.

level_1.name: Charge
level_1.description: With a mighty cry, you charge into the fray. Rush ahead 25ft. You are immune to exposed attacks and deal this ability's damage to any enemy whose space you move through.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check of any creature you hit. On success, they are knocked Prone.

level_1.name: Inspiring Strike
level_1.description: The sight of you landing an incredible blow fills your allies with determination.

effect.description: Grant an ally you can see a inspiration.

level_3.name: Shield Of Men
level_3.description: Leap in front of someone to become the target of an attack aimed at them. Any damage you receive as a result of this ability is halved.

level_6.name: Lionhearted
level_6.description: Your presence soothes your allies, inspiring them and guarding them against fear.

effect.description: Grant all allies within the ability's radius inspiration. Furthermore, for the ability's duration, any friendly creatures within the ability's radius are immune to the Frightened condition.

level_8.name: None Shall Pass
level_8.description: You are a bulwark of steel, hindering any enemy advance.

effect.description: When you make an exposed attack, you may make a Strength Resistance Check. On success, they are Halted. On failure, they are Hindered.

level_11.name: Move!
level_11.description: As you read the tide of the battle, call out a quick order to one of your allies.
level_11.upcast: You may spend an additional action point on this spell to spur them to action, both take movement and and make one action or offhand action.

effect.description: They are Spurred to Movement.

level_13.name: Stay on Your Feet
level_13.description: Even battered and bloodied, you fight on. If you fall to zero health, make a an Inner Fire Check with a target of 10. If you succeed, drop to 1 health instead.

level_15.name: Aura of Hope
level_15.description: You have become the ultimate protector for your allies.

effect.description: If an ally stands within the effect's radius, they may add +1 to all checks against enemy Threat and make death coin flips at advantage.

tier_1.name: Shield Bash
tier_1.description: Smash into an enemy with your Offhand and attempt to knock them off balance.

effect.description: Make a Strength Resistance Check. On success, they are Exposed to the next attack made against them.

tier_1.name: Phalanx
tier_1.description: Adopt a defensive stance, granting all allies within five feet your protection.

effect.description: While they stand at your side, your allies are considered to be Guarded.

tier_1.name: Goad
tier_1.description: Call a challenge to an enemy.

effect.description: Make a Charisma Resistance Check. On success, they become Fixated on you until the end of their next turn.

tier_1.name: Pivot
tier_1.description: As foes circle, place yourself between them and a nearby ally. Trade spaces with a willing creature within the ability's radius.

tier_1.name: Allied Strike
tier_1.description: As you strike your opponent, you batter away their defenses and deal bonus damage.

effect.description: If an ally attacks that opponent before the start of your next turn, they also deal bonus damage per this ability.

tier_2.name: Cleave
tier_2.description: Swing your weapon in a wide arc, targetting all enemies within the ability's radius.

tier_2.name: Controlled Advance
tier_2.description: As a foe falls to your blade, use the oportunity to push into their ranks. Whenever you slay an enemy with a melee attack, you may step forward into the space that they occupied. You are immune to exposed attacks during this movement. Once you've moved, you may make a standard attack.

tier_2.name: Overwhelming Strike
tier_2.description: With a blow like a hammerfall, you batter your enemy with a devestating attack.

effect.description: Make a Strength Resistance Check. On success, they are Staggered.

tier_2.name: Make Space
tier_2.description: Slam into your enemy with oppressive force.

effect.description: They must make a spell power saving throw. On failure, they are thrown back 15 feet. If they strike something as a result, they are Staggered until the end of their next turn.

tier_3.name: Very Dangerous over Short Distances
tier_3.description: Once you've closed with an enemy, you are able to press the advantage.

effect.description: Roll damage at advantage if you begin your turn next to your target.

tier_3.name: Feint
tier_3.description: Take up a defensive position as enemies circle. The next enemy who attacks you does so at disadvantage. You may immediately make a standard attack as a free action.

handbook.title: Intro
handbook.text: All muscle and rage, the Barbarian is a powerful frontline fighter. With their exceptional health and resileince, the Barbarian is able to shrug off blows that would level their allies. Once a Barbarian closes with an enemy they deal massive damage, laying low anyone that dares stand in their way. Out of combat, the Barbarian is among the strongest of the classes, and they use that strength to overcome their problems. The Barbarian's main weakness is their lack of arcane knowledge; for this reason, they are best backed up by a Bard, Cleric, or other support mage.

handbook.title: When Adventuring
handbook.text: The Barbarian's great strength is vital while adventuring. Whether they are bursting through walls or heaving great boulders, members of the Barbarian's party will stand on in awe as they use their strength to perform feats that look like magic.

handbook.title: When Socializing
handbook.text: While many Barbarians are at home among ruffians and thieves, others are gentle giants. Regardless, any Barbarian is able to use their demeanor to intimidate if necessary. When questioning someone, the party may deploy their Barbarian to learn the truth.

handbook.title: When in Combat
handbook.text: Because of their strength and resilience, a party's Barbarian is usually found on the front line of combat. They are expert at both offense and defense. As a Barbarian grows in strength, their abilities layer atop one another, until even a normal attack deals massive damage. Barbarians are weak against magical attacks, however, and need a solid back line to support them.

level_1.name: Berserk
level_1.upcast: Optionally, you may choose to make Berserk last for ten minutes, however, when it ends you suffer one level of Exhaustion.

effect.description: For the ability's duration, you are Resistant to physical damage and have advantage on any strength check.

level_1.name: Single Out
level_1.description: Survey the battlefield for a foe worthy of your rage.

effect.description: You gain 15ft of movement on any turn when you move towards them and your primary damage die increases by one step when you attack them hand-to-hand.

level_1.name: Frightening Blow
level_1.description: Spittle flies from your mouth as you strike at a foe.

effect.description: Make a Strength Resistance Check. On success, they are Frightened of you. If they die as a result of a strike, choose a different target within 30ft. to become Frightened.

level_3.name: Meat Shield
level_3.description: When you see an incoming attack, you may attempt to shield yourself with an adjacent enemy.

effect.description: Make a Strength Resistance Check. On success, they take the damage instead of you.

level_6.name: Terrify
level_6.description: As the enemy you've singled out looks up at your dark, rage-filled eyes, their constitution shakes.

effect.description: Make a Strength Resistance Check. On success, they become Frightened of you until the end of their next turn.

level_8.name: Throw Anything
level_8.description: Sometimes, you can't get close enough to punch. You are able to treat any object you throw as a regular weapon with a thrown range of 30ft. Additionally, if you use the Meat Shield ability and the target dies, you may immediately make an attack using them as a thrown weapon.

level_11.name: Resistant Rage
level_11.description: Your rage is so complete that you can shield yourself against enemy abilities.

effect.description: While going Berserk, roll any checks against an enemy's Threat with advantage.

level_13.name: The Opener
level_13.description: The chance of violence spurs you forward.

effect.description: On the first turn of combat, you are Quickened. Additionally, if you attack an enemy that has not yet taken a turn, use a 1AP attack at no cost.

level_15.name: You're Next!
level_15.description: If you slay your Singled Out target, you may immediately move 25ft and make a standard attack.

effect.description: If your target survives, they are Frightened of you until the end of their next turn.

tier_1.name: Brutal Attack
tier_1.description: Your muscles bulge and the earth shakes as you lash out at your enemy with a particularly vicious attack.

effect.description: Make a Strength Resistance Check. On success, they are knocked Prone.

tier_1.name: Throw Caution to the Wind
tier_1.description: Surge forward with reckless abandon, dealing bonus damage but leaving yourself exposed.

effect.description: At any time, you may declare that your attacks deal extra damage. However, when you make such an attack, you become Vulnerable until the start of your next turn.

tier_1.name: Guard-Break
tier_1.description: Swing high and fast in an effort to knock your opponent off-balance.

effect.description: Make a strength check against their resistance. On sucess they are staggered.

tier_1.name: Terrifying Damage
tier_1.description: You've learned to use your enemies' terror to your advantage. When you attack an enemy that is Frightened of you, deal bonus damage.

tier_2.name: Every Wall is a Door
tier_2.description: Use your strength to blast through an obstacle that is one foot thick or less, to climb solid stone, or to leap a treacherous gap. Move up to the ability's range unimpeded. You are still vulnerable to exposed attacks.

tier_2.name: The Closer
tier_2.description: If you attack an enemy that is prone, deal bonus damage.

tier_2.name: Adrenaline
tier_2.description: A bloody grin spreads across your face as you hurtle towards your foes.

effect.description: When you go berserk, you are Quickened.

tier_2.name: Corner
tier_2.description: They won't get away that easy! If an enemy moves to pass you within 15 feet to either side, you may spend a reaction to block them.

effect.description: If they are one size larger than you or smaller, they are immediately Halted. This ability does not work on flying targets.

tier_2.name: Relentless Rage
tier_2.description: Blood thunders in your ears as you rage, blocking out attacks against your mind.

effect.description: When you are going berserk, you are resistant to psychic damage and immune conditions which affect your state of mind.

tier_3.name: A Little Terror
tier_3.description: Use your intimidating presence to force an enemy to do your will.

effect.description: Make a Strength Resistance Check. On success, they are Controlled for one turn or must answer three of your questions truthfully.

tier_3.name: Stay on Your Feet
tier_3.description: Even battered and bloodied, you fight on. If you fall to zero health, flip a coin. On heads, you fall to 1 health instead.

tier_3.name: Blood for Blood
tier_3.description: When you are going berserk and an enemy harms you, you may use your reaction to make a simple counterattack. The counter attack cannot use any of your other abilities.

tier_3.name: I cast 'Fist'
tier_3.description: Your physical movements are so powerful that they warp the world around you. You are able to cast the equivalent of simple magic as long as you can explain how the shear power of your movements are causing the effects to occur. Follow the rules for informal magic, but always spend an action point.

handbook.title: Intro
handbook.text: Knives in the dark, rogues are famously stealthy and perceptive. They blend into crowds like shadow, gathering information or relieving a mark of their life or possessions. Rogues have little health, and as such, it can be disastrous if they are struck by an enemy attack. Thankfully, their stealth and abilities make them among the most slippery of combatants. While others tackle their challenges head on, rogues wait to find openings—when life gives you a guarded door, a rogue is the first to go in through a window.

handbook.title: When Adventuring
handbook.text: Incredibly dexterous, rogues are skilled at mantling buildings, lurking in the shadows, disarming traps and picking locks. As a rogue, you will often go in first to make certain the way is safe, using your abilities to clear a path for the less-nimble members of your adventuring party.

handbook.title: When Socializing
handbook.text: While some rogues stand back silently, others are charming and deceptive. With their nimble fingers, rogues are skilled at pocketing items that aren't theirs, though the wise rogue won't target their party with such exploits.

handbook.title: When in Combat
handbook.text: Rogues have low health but deal heavy damage to their foes. In combat, they spend much of their time skirting the edges of the fray, looking for opportunities to dash in, land a critical blow, and then disappear into the shadows. Rogues are adept at fighting with daggers, hurling them at opponents and slashing multiple times to deal quick, repeated damage. If a rogue invests in magic, they can use their abilities to avoid damage by becoming invisible, fill an area with shadows, or even launch themselves high into the air.

level_1.name: Thief's Strike
level_1.description: As you stab an enemy with one hand you rob them blind with the other.

effect.description: Make a Dexterity Resistance Check. On success, you are able to steal one object from them. If your attack is ranged, you may instead declare that an object is knocked free of their grasp.

level_1.name: Dodge
level_1.description: Attempt to pivot out of the way and avoid an incoming attack.
level_1.upcast: You may spend an additional action point to continue dodging until the start of your next turn.

effect.description: Make a Dexterity Resistance Check. On success, the attack misses. On failure, it deals half damage.

level_1.name: Creep
level_1.description: Focus your attention to vanish into the shadows. You gain advantage on checks made to hide or sneak for the next 3 rooms or until you make an attack.

level_3.name: Strike From The Shadows
level_3.description: Streak in and strike when an enemy is distracted. You deal bonus damage when you attack from hiding or when an enemy is Harried.

level_6.name: Opening Strike
level_6.description: Hurl a dagger or fire a shot at your foe as you rush at them.

effect.description: Make a Dexterity Resistance Check. On success, they are Exposed to your next attack on this turn. This ability cannot be used if you begin adjacent to your target.

level_8.name: Weakening Blow
level_8.description: As you land a particularly well placed blow, you slice into your opponent's vitals and sap their strength.

effect.description: Make a Dexterity Resistance Check. On success, their next attack is Weakened.

level_11.name: Evasion
level_11.description: Use your uncanny knack for survival to avoid an explosion or other area of effect attack.

effect.description: When an area of effect attack calls for you to make a check against an enemy's Threat, you take half damage on a failure or no damage on a success.

level_13.name: Ride The Blindspot
level_13.description: You have learned to stay behind an enemy, even if they try to turn on you.

effect.description: If you are standing behind an enemy and they try round on you, you may spend an action point to pivot around them as a reaction. If they try to move, you may move with them. Ride the Blindspot continues until the end of the enemy's turn.

level_15.name: Incredible Reflexes
level_15.description: As combat is joined, you burst into action. On the first round of combat, you are able to take two turns.

tier_1.name: Dart In
tier_1.description: When you use your Action to dash, you may end the movement with a melee attack.

tier_1.name: Shared Stealth
tier_1.description: Your stealth is so great that you are able to make up for your parties' shortcomings.

effect.description: For the next hour, add your proficiency to any friendly stealth rolls made within the ability's radius. If a party member already benefits from proficiency on stealth rolls, they may instead add an additional +1.

tier_2.name: Throw Caution to the Wind
tier_2.description: Surge forward with reckless abandon, dealing bonus damage but leaving yourself exposed.

effect.description: At any time, you may declare that your attacks deal extra damage. However, when you make such an attack, you become Vulnerable until the start of your next turn.

tier_3.name: Slip Away
tier_3.description: You are able to streak in, harm a foe, and then retreat again.

effect.description: Whenever you strike an enemy, you are considered Elusive to them until the end of your turn.

handbook.title: Intro
handbook.text: Protectors of natural order, Rangers are masters of traversing the wilderness. Tales of Rangers are sung in the borderlands, where the wilds crash against civilization. Rangers silently push back against the chaos of the wilds, protecting unwitting villagers from abberations, fiends, and wild things. Rangers rarely stay in one place, and the area under their protection can span for hundreds of miles. This means that their relationships are few and transient, though some take an animal companion or find friendship with a local druid or wizard. Rangers are often among the first to realize when something sinister is brewing. When they end up in an adventuring party, it is usually because something has threatened the natural order and they believe that they can help restore it.

handbook.title: When Adventuring
handbook.text: Rangers are invaluable when traversing the wilderness, using their high Intelligence and Dexterity to lead the way through trecherous climbs. Rangers are expert at piecing tracking foes and piecing together what happened from even the faintest sign.

handbook.title: When Socializing
handbook.text: While rangers have a reputation as brooding figures found in the corner of the local tavern, they command great respect from the citizens of border towns. A ranger's word carries weight, and even the few question their expertise when it comes to monsters or monster-hunting.

handbook.title: When in Combat
handbook.text: Rangers are intelligent combatants who fight with precision and care. Their Analyze ability allows them to learn their enemy before striking, dealing extra damage and finding ways to slip through their defenses. Some rangers choose to master the blade, while others keep a distance, choosing the Path of the Hunter and wielding the bow. Regardless, Rangers are fierce combatants who excel at targetting and slaying individual foes.

level_1.name: Analyze
level_1.description: Spend a moment watching an enemy or make an Intelligence Check when you find tracks or sign of a creature's passing. Learn one fact of your choice about the creature, for example, what type of creature it was or its Resistance is.

effect.description: For the ability's duration roll Threat Checks, Resistance Checks, and Called Shots against the creature at advantage. When out of combat, take advantage on tracking checks made to follow or detect the analyzed creatures.

level_1.name: Pin Down
level_1.description: You aim a carefully placed attack in order to slow your target's advance.

effect.description: Make a Dexterity Resistance Check. On success, they are Hindered.
Move up to 15ft without provoking exposed attacks. This movement ignores difficult terrain and may carry you through enemy spaces without provoking an exposed attack.

level_3.name: Decoy
level_3.description: From hiding, cup your hands and make a perfect monster call.

effect.description: Make an Intelligence Resistance Check. On success, your target is Lured to a point of your choosing. Intelligent creatures may ignore the luring, but are instead Stunned on their next turn.

level_6.name: Piercing Attack
level_6.description: You find exactly the right angle to fire a shot which pierces your enemies.

effect.description: The attack passes through all enemies in a line before you, dealing damage to each.

level_8.name: Covering Fire
level_8.description: As the final action on your turn, lay down covering fire across a 15x60ft line before you.

effect.description: Until the start of your next turn, the area is considered difficult terrain and enemies who move through or begin their turn within it take damage.

level_11.name: Guard-Break
level_11.description: Make a carefully aimed attack meant to batter away an enemy's defenses.

effect.description: Make a Dexterity Resistance Check. On success, your target is Exposed until the end of your next turn.

level_13.name: Nimble
level_13.description: Your perception is so advanced that you are able to avoid arrows and other ranged attacks.

effect.description: You are permanently considered to be Guarded against targeted ranged attacks.

level_15.name: Volley
level_15.description: Fire arrow after arrow in a volley of arching shots. They rain down on enemies in an area of your choosing.

tier_1.name: Grappler's Line
tier_1.description: Affix a cord to your arrow and fire it at a target. As it hits, it holds fast, creating a durable link between you.

effect.description: If your target is a living creature, make a Dexterity Resistance Check. On success, they become Tethered to you.

tier_1.name: Focus
tier_1.description: Carefully line up your next shot.

effect.description: When you attack on this turn you may double your weapon's effective range, ignore partial cover, and roll damage at advantage.

tier_1.name: Follow Up
tier_1.description: Blow after blow, you wear your target down. If you attack an enemy, subsequent attacks deal extra damage if you don't choose another target. Extra damage starts at 1d4 and grows with each hit, capping at 1d8.

tier_2.name: Strider
tier_2.description: Your base movement is increased by 10ft.

effect.description: Additionally, difficult terrain no longer hinders you. When out of combat, take advantage on dexterity checks made to navigate natural obstacles.

handbook.title: Intro
handbook.text: Servant of the divine. A cleric has given themselves over to the worship of a deity or deities. For some, this means a life spent in a temple, while for others, it means wandering the realms and preaching the good word. As an adventurer, your deity has chosen you for something special and has granted you the power to carry out their will. Clerics are practitioners of divine magic, and are known for their ability to bring healing to the sick and dying.

handbook.title: When Adventuring
handbook.text: Clerics use divine magic to overcome their problems. When adventuring you may call back the soul of a departed person for questioning, bind an enemy in place, or project yourself across the realms to aid a distant ally. Unlike most other classes, the cleric always has someone in their corner. As they reach higher levels, a Cleric's deity or their servants may reach out, giving guidance and providing marching orders.

handbook.title: When Socializing
handbook.text: Clerics are welcome most everywhere, and it is not out of the ordinary for commonfolk to approach them for blessings or healing. Temples can be found scattered throughout the realms, and can serve as a friendly place for practitioners a given faith. Indeed, the only people who generally dislike clerics are those of competing faiths, or followers of dark gods in opposition to a cleric's deity.

handbook.title: When in Combat
handbook.text: Clerics often take a supporting role in combat, granting powerful boons to their allies and weakening their enemies. Healing magic is at the core of a cleric's arsenal; when a party's barbarian launches themselves headlong into a horde of skeletons, it is often the cleric that keeps them standing long enough to emerge victorious. Clerics are not without the ability to fight, however. With beams of scouring light, they are able to blind their foes and push them back into the darkness.

tier_1.name: Beam of Light
tier_1.description: A blinding beam of radiance streaks from your holy symbol towards your target.
tier_1.upcast: For each additional action point spent on this spell, deal an additional dice of damage.

effect.description: If you roll max damage on any of the dice for this attack, your target is Blinded until the end of their next turn.

tier_1.name: Ward of Protection
tier_1.description: Pray over one of your allies, beseeching your deity to protect them from harm.

effect.description: For the spell's duration, they are considered Guarded against all damage.

tier_1.name: Prayer of Healing
tier_1.description: As you channel the power of your deity, waves of healing knit your target's wounds shut. If you physically touch your target, double the number of dice rolled.

tier_1.name: Bind
tier_1.description: Lift your hand to stop an encroaching enemy.
tier_1.upcast: For each additional action point spent on this spell, you may attempt to bind two more creatures.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they are Incapacitated.
effect.save: As an action, your target may force you to remake your check.

tier_1.name: Mend
tier_1.description: Your hands glow as you magically mend small dents, dings, scratches, and tears on an item you are touching. You may also use this spell to render poisons innocuous, to heal minor status effects such as drunkenness, or to convert water to holy water at a rate of one gallon per hour.
tier_1.upcast: You may spend an action point on this spell to increase it's power, mending larger items such as broken walls, wheels, or armor. In a similar manner, you may spend an action point to remove a status effect from an ally or to render a curse innocuous for one day.

tier_2.name: Guardian Blade
tier_2.description: In a burst of golden sparks, a holy weapon appears to float in the air beside you. On your turn, you may use an Offhand Action to move the blade up to thirty feet and attack with it. The blade must remain within one hundred feet of you or be de-summoned.

tier_2.name: Excoriating Beam
tier_2.description: A blinding beam of light streaks forth, ringed with halos. The blast harms everyone in a line before you, but is stopped by inanimate objects with a width greater than one foot.

effect.description: For any target hit by the beam, make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they are Blinded until the end of their next turn.

tier_2.name: Fiery Rebuke
tier_2.description: White hot flames fill the space around you as you call on your deity for protection. They deal damage to everyone in the spell's radius.
tier_2.upcast: For each additional action point spent on this spell, increase its radius by 10 feet.

tier_2.name: Mass Heal
tier_2.description: Hands clasped, you pray for the health of all those around you. Glowing golden light wraps any allies within the spell's radius as they are healed.
tier_2.upcast: For each additional action point spent on this spell, increase its radius by 15ft and add an additional dice.

tier_2.name: Dispel Magic
tier_2.description: Carefully undo the weave of a first tier spell or curse. If the magic that you seek to reverse is of a higher tier, the Grand Poohbah will ask you to make an Intelligence Check. Dispel magic does not heal damage or repair magically damaged objects.

tier_3.name: Pillar of Dawn
tier_3.description: Spread your hands wide as you summon forth the glory of your deity. A pillar of fire falls from the heavens and envelops a radius of your choosing. The fire crackles and spreads, reducing your target to cinders.

effect.description: Anyone struck by the beam is instantly set ablaze and begins Burning.

tier_3.name: Invulnerability
tier_3.description: Magic suffuses your target, and their skin becomes hard as diamond even as all magics are repelled from them.

effect.description: For the spell's duration, they are considered Invincible.

tier_1.name: Enlarge
tier_1.description: As you grasp your holy symbol, glowing energy suffuses a creature of your choosing.

effect.description: At once, their body is Enlarged.

tier_1.name: Speak with the Dead
tier_1.description: Anoint a body with holy oil and clutch a candle close. As you reach out to your deity, the candle flares as the deceased's spirit returns to the mortal coil. The corpse cannot move, but is able to communicate so long as it's mouth and ears are present. You may ask it three questions before the spell ends and the flame goes out. This spell may be cast on a given creature exactly once.
tier_1.upcast: You may spend an additional action point to ask an additional two questions of the corpse.

tier_1.name: Leap of Faith
tier_1.description: Look skyward and put your faith in your deity. As you step out onto a surface that will not hold you, it is instead solid and safe. In this way you can walk atop water, molten earth, or even across thin air. This spell continues until you lose concentration or until you have moved 60ft.

tier_1.name: Pacify
tier_1.description: As an enemy attempts to harm you with a targeted attack, call out to your deity for aid.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, the attack misses. On failure, it deals half damage.

tier_1.name: Holy Light
tier_1.description: With a muttered prayer, you raise an object aloft and it illuminates with the intensity of a torch.

effect.description: Undead and demonic creatures who begin their turn within the light are Staggered.

tier_2.name: Sphere of Encasement
tier_2.description: Hold a piece of quarts to your eye and view a creature through it. At once, an orb of magical energy forms around them with 50 hit points. Nothing may pass through the orb, though it always has enough oxygen for the creature within. The creature inside can push the orb to cause it to rotate, moving a distance up to half its movement on its turn.

tier_2.name: Scry
tier_2.description: You press a focusing gem against a reflective surface and speak the primordial word for 'reveal,' allowing you to view and hear a person or place you've seen as if through a one way window. The spell cannot penetrate lead or protective spells. Upon casting, you may alert your target. They may spend an action point to tether the spell to a nearby reflective surface if they are a mage.
tier_2.upcast: If you target an unwilling creature, you must make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On failure, they know that someone tried to view them.

tier_2.name: Town Portal
tier_2.description: When you enter a town, you may pray over a dwelling and draw a holy glyph on the doorframe. From that point forward, you may perform a ritual to open a door to that location, regardless of distance. You may mark at most one building per town in this way.

tier_2.name: Truesight
tier_2.description: Your eyes shimmer with holy light as you speak a prayer for clarity.

effect.description: By the power of your deity, grant yourself Trusight.

tier_2.name: M&M's Beckoning Call
tier_2.description: Lay your hands on a willing creature and imbue them with magic of recall. One time over the spell's duration, you are able to instantly teleport them to a space adjacent to you, regardless of distance. This teleportation has the same restrictions as any other, may be blocked by certain spells or abilities, and is performed as a Free Action.

tier_3.name: Resurrection
tier_3.description: Lay out the body of someone who has died within the past week. Spend time anointing them with oil, burning incense, and using your magic to mend their body. Lay a soul gem on their chest and ask your deity for their strength. Make an Inner Fire Check. On full or partial success, reclaim the target's soul and return them to life. On full or partial failure, they may not be resurrected as determined by the Grand Poohbah.
tier_3.upcast: If someone who loved the deceased dearly helps you, they may spend one action point to to grant you advantage on your check.

tier_3.name: Avatar
tier_3.description: Close your eyes and empty your mind. By the will of your diety, project your conciousness across the void. A faintly glowing copy of you appears somewhere in the Realms at a location of your choosing. You control the copy as though it is you. The copy has full health and action points, and knows your abilities. It persists until your real body loses concentration on it, or until it falls to zero health and disappears.

tier_3.name: Mantle of Dawn
tier_3.description: A halo blazes about your head, shedding radiant light in a radius around you.

effect.description: For the spell's duration, all enemies within the radius are Weakened. At the spell's start, all allies in the radius gain inspiration.

handbook.title: Intro
handbook.text: Students of the arcane, wizards are practitioners of world-bending magics. Advanced wizards can take flight, smite their foes with balls of fire, and bend time to their whim. Even fledgling wizards can summon magic familiars, conjure candlight, and fill their foes mouths' with slithering slugs. These advanced magics come at a price—wizards must study diligently to gain their power, standing on the shoulders of giants as they strive to become legends in their own right.

handbook.title: When Adventuring
handbook.text: A wizard's arsenal of spells is of great use when adventuring. The ability to become ethereal, step between distant doors, and summon platforms are of immense value to any adventuring party. With their great intelligence, wizards are also of use whenever questions of history, geography, or intuition are encountered.

handbook.title: When Socializing
handbook.text: Some wizards are scatterbrained, others stoic, and some are merely excited to see the world. While a wizard might have trouble being the party's face when dealing with common folk, they can be of enormous value whenever speaking with the intelligentsia of a region.

handbook.title: When in Combat
handbook.text: A wizard's spells can shape the face of combat, taking powerful enemies out of play through a combination of serious damage and status effects. However, wizards are notorious for their frail forms and low health. As such, wizards must boost their defense with magic, or hide behind their more resilient allies.

tier_1.name: Flare
tier_1.description: You smear a streak of phosphorus upon a pebble and hold your hand aloft, loosing a beam of fire at your target.

effect.description: If you roll max damage on this attack, your target begins Burning.

tier_1.name: Jet of Frost
tier_1.description: Frigid air howls from your focus, biting at the enemies in a cone before you.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they are Hindered.

tier_1.name: Arcane Armor
tier_1.description: Grip a lump of iron in your hand. As you channel your magic, the iron glows and is consumed.

effect.description: A shimmering set of armor appears upon you, and you are Guarded for the spell's duration.

tier_1.name: Eat Slugs
tier_1.description: Fixing your eyes on your target, you crush a writhing bug between your fingers.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they are Staggered.

tier_1.name: Candlelight
tier_1.description: Roll a piece of string between your fingers and channel your magic into it. It magically ignites, but is not burned. The flickering light hovers at your side. The light is difficult to snuff and obeys your subconcious commands, moving as you instruct it within a radius centered on you. If it leaves the radius, it continues to hover, but cannot obey you. The candle gives off light within a thirty foot radius.

components: A piece of string or wick

tier_2.name: Ice Spear
tier_2.description: Vapor in the air crystalizes into a spear of ice and hurtles towards your target.
tier_2.upcast: You may spend an additional action point on this spell to add 2d6 damage.

tier_2.name: Fireball
tier_2.description: Clap your hands together to summon a bead of sizzling light. It streaks towards your target before erupting into a massive fireball.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, your targets begin Burning.

tier_2.name: Octahedral Barrier
tier_2.description: In a rush of energy, a pyramid of solid magic forms around you and serves as a barrier.

effect.description: It protects you and any allies in close proximity from an incoming ranged or magical attack.

tier_2.name: Door Step
tier_2.description: As you place your hand on a door-handle or walk through an archway, magic flows through you, opening a portal to another door within range. Instantaneously transport to that doorway.

tier_2.name: Dispel Magic
tier_2.description: Carefully undo the weave of a first tier spell or curse. If the magic that you seek to reverse is of a higher tier, the Grand Poohbah will ask you to make an Intelligence Check. Dispel magic does not heal damage or repair magically damaged objects.

tier_3.name: Fly
tier_3.description: The weave of magic supports and guides your target and gravity fades away. For the spell's duration, your target can fly. Their flying speed is equal to twice their normal walking speed.
tier_3.upcast: For each additional action point spent, grant five more creatures the power of flight.

tier_3.name: Tri-beam
tier_3.description: A pulse of energy fills the air as you touch the realm of chaos and loose three beams of raw magic.

effect.description: Roll 1d6 to determine the type of each beam, followed by an Inner Fire Resistance Check to see if the target suffers a status effect. Status effects can be found in the Rulebook.

tier_1.name: Arcane Blow
tier_1.description: With a sound like a thunderclap, you punch your foe with a fist instilled with arcane power.

effect.description: If they are large or smaller, roll an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they are knocked back 15 feet. On a natural 20, they are knocked Prone.

tier_1.name: Pindigae's Arcane Orbs
tier_1.description: Two multicolored orbs of crackling energy swirl about you before streaking towards as many targets. Each orb deals the spell's damage. The orbs do not need to target a single creature.
tier_1.upcast: For each additional action point spent on this spell, fire an additional orb.

tier_1.name: Featherfall
tier_1.description: Grip a feather between your fingers and your magic ignites it. Choose a creature or object to slow its falling speed to that of a feather.
tier_1.upcast: You may spend an additional action point to use this spell on up to five additonal objects or creatures.

tier_1.name: Bubble of Air
tier_1.description: Knead a bit of soap and blow upon it.
tier_1.upcast: You may spend an additional action point to create five additional bubbles of air.

effect.description: A shimmering bubble of breathable air appears around your target's head, sustaining them for up to one hour.

tier_1.name: Summon Familiar
tier_1.description: Summon a small animal to be your familiar. It follows your instructions with intelligence, and you are able to meditate to see through it's eyes. If your familiar is killed or separated from you, you may cast this spell again to bring it back, but it drops anything it is holding. If your familiar is within 100ft of you, you may cast a spell from its position. It acts on your turn and has a movement speed of 30ft. When you re-summon your familiar, you may change its form. Your familiar hit points equal to your Inner Fire.

tier_2.name: Chain Lightning
tier_2.description: Thunder peels as your magic leaps from target to target. After your lightning hits your first target, roll 1d4. If the roll is greater than 1, the lightning chains to another enemy of your choice. Continue until you roll a 1. Lightning may only strike the same creature twice and may leap a maximum of ten times.

tier_2.name: Message
tier_2.description: Hold an object which belongs to someone you've met. You are able to telepathically send them a message of up to 25 words, regardless of distance. The creature then has sixty seconds to respond to you, also with 25 words.

components: An item that belongs to your target

tier_2.name: Become Ethereal
tier_2.description: Your form flickers as you enter the plane of the ethereal. You may stay there for a number of minutes equal to 1d6 + your Inner Fire or until you choose to regain your material form as a free action.

effect.description: While in this state, you are considered Ethereal.

tier_2.name: Platform
tier_2.description: With a twist of your hand, a circular disk of purple light appears at a point of your choosing. The disk is one foot thick and is formed of solid magic. It is capable of holding any amount of weight. If a target is in the disk's space, it may leap atop it.

tier_2.name: Invisibility
tier_2.description: Over the span of a second, you target's skin, then organs, then bones disappear.

effect.description: For the spell's duration, they are Invisible.

tier_3.name: Gate
tier_3.description: Energy hums as you tear a rift in reality and create a gate to another place. The gate stands ten feet tall and twenty feet wide. You may target a specific location that you have visited as the other side of the gate, or else make an Intelligence Check to target somewhere you have not been. The target may be another of the Realms.

tier_3.name: Black Hole
tier_3.description: There is a scream of air as a black hole appears at a point of your choosing, pulling all objects within the spell's radius 15ft towards it.

effect.description: Each turn, make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, everyone within the spell's radius is pulled 25ft towards the black hole. Anyone within 50ft of the black hole is Hindered, and anyone who touches the it takes the spell's damage.

tier_3.name: Stop Time
tier_3.description: You speak the forgotten tongue of the Timekeepers and time slows to a crawl in a radius around you.

components: A stopwatch, hourglass, or other time-telling implement

tier_3.upcast: You may spend an additional action point to increase the radius to 300 feet.

effect.description: All Minions are affected by the spell. For others, make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they are stopped in time and are Incapacitated for the spell's duration. Anyone or anything that is touched or attacked is returned to the normal flow of time.

handbook.title: Intro
handbook.text: Bound to darkness. By ambition or necessity, a Warlock enters into a pact with an otherworldly force. This being grants them incredible magics, but at a cost; every pact has it's price. This price be anything from gathering information for your patron to performing tasks for them. Regardless, your pact and your patron will greatly color your adventuring career.

handbook.title: When Adventuring
handbook.text: Warlocks have access to a vast array of useful magics which can aid any adventuring party. In particular, Warlocks are masters of gathering information; spells like Eyes of Uriel and Echoes of the Past allow you to view the world around you in a way no one else can. Like other casters, Warlocks have low health, and often stand back and watch as other party members throw themselves into harm's way.

handbook.title: When Socializing
handbook.text: Known for their Charisma, a warlock can easily become the face of an adventuring party. And when force of personality fails, magic can intervene. The powerful Convince and Mask of Shadows spells can be used to impersonate enemies or magically manipulate particularly troublesome individuals.

handbook.title: When in Combat
handbook.text: Warlocks shine in combat with one of the most aggressive spell lists in the realms. Elditch Blast, targets single foes, Tide of Shadow summons a cone of deadly dark, and Cthulian Tentacles causes eldritch protrusions to grasp at multiple foes.

tier_1.name: Death Coil
tier_1.description: With a howl like the damned, a screaming bolt of green energy tears forth, decaying your enemies where it strikes. If you roll maximum damage on this spell, knock your opponent back 15 feet.

tier_1.name: Tide of Shadow
tier_1.description: Swirling black smoke billows in a cloud before you, damaging enemies in a cone.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they are Blinded until the end of their next turn.

tier_1.name: Surrogate
tier_1.description: As an enemy attack hurtles towards you, attempt to compel someone block it.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check against a hostile creature within range. On success, they dive in front of you to save you from an attack.

tier_1.name: Mental Assault
tier_1.description: Hideous and discordant voices fill your target's ears.

effect.description: Each turn, make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they are Staggered.

tier_1.name: Curse
tier_1.description: Muttering an oath, you place a curse upon a creature of your choosing. Whenever you attack that creature, deal bonus damage. If the creature dies, you may immediately move the curse to another creature within range.

tier_2.name: Murder of Crows
tier_2.description: With a rush of wind, a murder of crows streaks past you and to a location of your choice, dealing damage as it goes. For the spell's duration, any enemy who begins their turn within the swarm or who passes through it takes damage. As an Offhand Action on your turn, you may command the murder of crows to move up to 30 feet. A creature may be harmed at most one time by a swarm of crows per round of combat.

tier_2.name: Cthulian Tentacles
tier_2.description: At your command, shadows coalesce into hideous tentacles which burst from the ground and converge on two of your foes.
tier_2.upcast: You may spend an additional action point to create a third tentacle.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they are Grappled, and take damage at the start of each turn.

tier_2.name: Shadowstep
tier_2.description: Fade into the darkness and immediately re-appear within a shadow in the spell's range. Both the start and destination of this spell must be in partial darkness.
tier_2.upcast: You may spend an additional action point on this spell to increase its range to 100ft.

tier_2.name: Eyes of Uriel
tier_2.description: 1d4+1 levitating eyes open in the air behind you. Each is the size of a balled fist, has 1hp and moves 15ft per turn. If you concentrate, you can see through the eyes. When the eyes close, they become invisible.

effect.description: If an eye is within fifteen feet of an attack, you may use your reaction to cause it to sacrifice itself and become the attack's target instead.

tier_2.name: Armor of Lucien
tier_2.description: For a moment, radiant armor appears about you before fading from vision. For the spell's duration, your gain an amount of temporary health equal to your inner fire times five. When the temporary health is gone or the spell's duration elapses, the spell ends. While the spell is active, anyone who strikes you takes damage.

tier_3.name: Sorris' Decay
tier_3.description: Your outstretched hand beckons forth the essence of the abyss, a roiling tide of inky darkness. Like a dragon's breath, decay bursts forward, washing over everyone in a cone before you.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they take full damage and begin to Rot. On failure, they take half damage.

tier_3.name: Open Rift
tier_3.description: Tear a rift in the fabric of reality. Anyone who jumps through is transported to a location of your choosing within 1,000 miles. If you have visited the location, you are able to open the rift with no trouble. If not, roll an intelligence check with the Grand Poohbah to determine where the rift lets out. Whenever this spell is cast, roll 1d10. On a 1, something comes out of the rift.

tier_1.name: Wilting Touch
tier_1.description: Black veins creep down your arms as you grip an enemy and channel powerful necrotic energy into them.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they begin Rotting.

tier_1.name: Shadow Ward
tier_1.description: Create a shroud of inky darkness around yourself.

effect.description: Allies can see through, but enemies are considered to be in magical darkness and are Blinded. Additionally, you are resistant to targeted ranged attacks while within the darkness.

tier_1.name: Echoes of the Past
tier_1.description: Echoes and specters dance in your vision as you reach into the past. For the duration, you are able to see what happened within the spell's radius over the past day. However, you cannot see everyone who was present. Roll 1d6 to determine the number of people you are able to see.
tier_1.upcast: You may spend an additional action point to look back within the past week.

tier_1.name: Telepathy
tier_1.description: You are able to project your thoughts into someone's mind. Willing participants can let you to read their thoughts, allowing for two-way communication. For non-willing participants, you are able to glean only surface level detail unless you wish to probe deeper. To do so, you must make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, you are able to glean something of their inner thoughts, but they know that their mind has been read.

tier_1.name: Embed Eye
tier_1.description: Embed a magical eye in a non-living material. The eye has 1 hit point, but is ethereal. While the eye is closed, it is invisible. For the spell's duration, you can concentrate to cause the eye to open and to see through it.
tier_1.upcast: You can spend one additional action point to cause the eye to last for 1 week, or two to make it last for one month.

tier_2.name: Tethered Minds
tier_2.description: Tether the minds of up to eight individuals. For the spell's duration, they are able to speak telepathically regardless of distance. The effects of the spell end if a creature enters another realm.
tier_2.upcast: You may spend an additional action point on this spell to increase its duration to 24 hours.

tier_2.name: Shared Fate
tier_2.description: Tether two creatures together.

effect.description: If one dies, make an Inner Fire Resistance Check against the other. On success, they take an amount of damage equal to the killing blow or half as much on failure. The creatures must be within one hundred feet of each other, and the damage cannot exceed twice the maximum hit points of the creature that perished.

tier_2.name: Rebuke Spell
tier_2.description: When an enemy successfully casts a spell, make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they also suffer the effects of their spell if it was negative, or you also gain the benefits if it was positive.

tier_2.name: Lift
tier_2.description: As you hold your hands aloft, dark energy begins to surround three of your foes.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they are hoisted ten feet in the air and Grappled.

tier_2.name: Hurl Through Hell
tier_2.description: A gaping pit envelops your enemy and sends them careening through the nine layers of the abyss.

effect.description: Make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. On success, they spend 1d4-1 (minimum 1) turns falling through the hells. On failure, they take half damage and are not sucked into the portal. When they return, they reappear and slam to the earth, falling prone and taking the spell's damage.

tier_3.name: Torugar the Many Tongued Demon
tier_3.description: A black wind howls as you summon a pit housing Torugar, an ancient demon from the Abyss. Each turn, 1d6 tongues (max 6) writhe forth to grapple creatures nearby. For grapples, make an Inner Fire Resistance Check. Torugar does not distinguish friend from foe. If a tongue takes 25 damage, it lets go and retreats. On their turn, grappled creatures take damage and are pulled 2d4 spaces towards the pit.

effect.description: Anyone who enters the pit is transported to Torugar's Realm.

tier_3.name: Reclaim Soul
tier_3.description: Prepare the body of someone who has died  recently. Scrawl runes on their flesh to mark them as a conduit to the realm beyond. Find the location of their soul using a tuning fork. Once you've found it, place a soul gem on their chest, and reach beyond the divide. Make an Inner Fire Check. On a success, reclaim the target's soul and return them to life. On failure, some parts are missing, or something else returns and takes up residence in the body.
tier_3.upcast: If someone who loved the deceased dearly helps you, they may spend one action point to to grant you +2 on your check.

tier_3.name: Astral Prison
tier_3.description: Using a void prism, create a pocket dimension which overlaps the material realm and attempt to banish a creature to it. You must achieve three successful Inner Fire Resistance Checks before accumulating three failures. You may make such a check as an Offhand Action each turn until you have succeeded, failed, or the creature has left the spell's radius. On success, speak an omen which will occur in this age. The creature is bound until it is freed or the omen occurs. It cannot free itself.
